* feat(helm): add IP-restricted route template

Add configurable route template for sandbox-api with IP whitelist.
Disabled by default, enabled per-environment via infra repo values.
Replaces manually created restricted routes.

* feat(helm): add dedicated helm-backup chart for cluster config backups

Separate chart from helm-api with BuildConfig, ImageStream, ConfigMap,
CronJob, and BitwardenSyncSecret for hourly cluster config backups."}},"strategy":{"type":"Docker","dockerStrategy":{"pullSecret":{"name":"builder-dockercfg-gxql6"},"dockerfilePath":"tools/backup/Containerfile"}},"output":{"to":{"kind":"DockerImage","name":"image-registry.openshift-image-registry.svc:5000/babylon-sandbox-api/sandbox-backup:latest"},"pushSecret":{"name":"builder-dockercfg-gxql6"}},"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"4","memory":"4Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"1","memory":"1Gi"}},"postCommit":{},"nodeSelector":null},"status":{"phase":"New","outputDockerImageReference":"image-registry.openshift-image-registry.svc:5000/babylon-sandbox-api/sandbox-backup:latest","config":{"kind":"BuildConfig","namespace":"babylon-sandbox-api","name":"sandbox-backup"},"output":{},"conditions":[{"type":"New","status":"True","lastUpdateTime":"2026-04-28T13:51:36Z","lastTransitionTime":"2026-04-28T13:51:36Z"}]}}
